Shweta 🥺

Can I borrow just 2 minutes?

I know I may have messed up, but please hear me out.

I Know I Hurt You

I mistakenly thought you had become a doctor. I realize my assumption may have hurt you, and I'm genuinely sorry.

A Small Apology From Pratham 🌸

After so many years, talking to you again made me smile. Hurting you was the last thing I wanted.

✉️

Dear Shweta

When I assumed you had become a doctor, I wasn't trying to ignore your achievements. I simply misunderstood and regret it.

Learning that you're pursuing a Master's in Physics made me admire your dedication even more.

If my words came across the wrong way, please know my intention was never to hurt you.

— Pratham 🌷

✉️

Tap the envelope

Thank you for reading this.

As I've hurt you even a little, I hope you'll forgive me. 🌺🌼🏵️🌸

If we take another chance to talk, I hope it starts with a smile 😊

❤️ Pratham
